form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 5th of 10 at Ipswich Cl2 on March 26 over 1100m, 2 len behind Capital Heart with 56.5kg at $8. Previously second-up 8th of 11 at Eagle Farm 3yo Hcp on August 2 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Alpha Sofie carrying 54.5kg at $26. Will come on from that run and is among the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). Second run back. First-up after four months 5th of 10 at Ipswich Cl2 on March 26 over 1100m, 2 len behind Capital Heart with 56.5kg at $8. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crowded on jumping. Laid in under pressure down the running.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months won by 0.6 len at this track 3yo Mdn March 14 over 1200m defeating Yeah Buddy with 59kg at $17. Previously second-up 2nd of 7 at Warwick 3yo Mdn-Sw on October 11 over 1350m, 3.5 len behind Norty Forty with 58kg at $2.25. Has ability and another bold showing is expected.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began very awkwardly. Raced greenly near the 1000m.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming won by 1.2 len at Coffs Harbour Ctry Cl1 March 9 over 1010m in heavy going defeating Intense Steel carrying 57kg at $4.40. Last start sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 12 at Eagle Farm 3yo Hcp on March 21 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Angel Ladder carrying 54kg at $51. Longer journey a plus and could find best.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently 3rd of 12 at Eagle Farm Cl1 on March 25 over 1400m, 1.1 len behind Subterrain with 55kg at $5.50. The run before that took up a position near the tail 2nd of 10 at this track 0 - 62 on March 14 over 1300m, long-neck behind Linwar carrying 56.5kg at $3.20. Best chance in recent starts to break through.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered between runners on jumping away and lost ground.

Slow into stride.

Laid in momentarily approaching the 400m. Near the 250m, shifted out abruptly.

Bumped on jumping. Raced keenly near the 600m.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign seventh of 9 at this track 3yo Bm60 November 22 over 1050m, 6 len behind Seams Logical carrying 58kg at $41. Previously first up; ninth of 11 at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw August 30 over 1100m, 7 len behind Cryptolini with 58kg at $81. Happy to work around.

Bumped the inside running rail near the 900m and again near the 700m.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third-up today. Resumes off a 42 day letup. Resuming came from midfield and won by 1.3 len at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw February 14 over 1050m in the wet defeating Head Of The River carrying 56kg at $4.20. Last start ran last of 12 at Eagle Farm 3yo Qlty on February 28 over 1000m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Dr Farthing with 53kg at $31. Disappointing last time and will need to improve sharply.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third-up today. First-up won by 0.7 len at Gatton Mdn-Sw March 1 over 860m on a soft track defeating Thrill Seeker carrying 55.5kg at $1.50. Second-up came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 8 at Ipswich F&M Bm62 on March 14 over 1100m, 2 len behind Take Achance On Me carrying 55.5kg at $21. This looks a stern test.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation when last of 10 at Sunshine Coast 3&4yo Bm65 October 26 over 1200m, 16 len behind Ready To Schipp carrying 55kg at $81. First up last campaign tenth of 13 at this track 3yo Mdn September 13 over 1200m, soft track; 6 len behind Autofiction carrying 55kg at $101. Might be better off following this outing.
